name: Rosseti, Public Joint Stock Company
summary: Rosseti, Public Joint Stock Company, together with its subsidiaries, provides electricity transmission and distribution services in Russia. The company also provides technological connection services. It operates 2.37 million kilometers of power transmission lines; and 517,000 substations with transformer capacity of approximately 802 gigavolt-ampere. The company was formerly known as JSC Russian Grids and changed its name to Rosseti, Public Joint Stock Company in August 2014. Rosseti, Public Joint Stock Company is based in Moscow, Russia.
